creator: Alexander Terp
description:
Surfaced during round-2 LSP verification (2026-05-25), test 18a.

The codegen infrastructure from commit 2141aa75 landed cleanly. `docs/funcs/` exists with 5 migrated builtins: `abs`, `len`, `print`, `range`, `sort`. Hover on these shows rich docs (signature + prose + examples). Hover on any other builtin (e.g. `print_err`, `filter`, `trim`, `parse_int`) falls back gracefully to bare-signature display.

**Work to complete the picture:**
- Migrate the remaining ~70 builtins listed in `rts/signatures.go` into individual `docs/funcs/*.md` files.
- Each file follows the structure already documented in `docs/funcs/README.md`: `# <name>`, `## Signature`, `## Parameters`, `## Examples`, `## Category` (+ optional `## Notes`, `## See also`).
- Existing 5 files (`abs.md`, `len.md`, `print.md`, `range.md`, `sort.md`) are canonical references.

**Phasing:** batch ~10 at a time, re-running codegen each batch. Land in small commits so each batch is reviewable.

**Suggested grouping by category (rough cuts):**
- io: print_err, pprint, debug, input, read_file, write_file, read_stdin, has_stdin, get_path, find_paths, delete_path
- strings: replace, lower, upper, trim, trim_*, starts_with, ends_with, count, split, split_lines, index_of, matches, hyperlink, plain
- collections: keys, values, unique, reverse, join, filter, map, flat_map, zip
- math/numeric: rand, rand_int, seed_random, pow, ceil, floor, round, min, max, clamp, sum
- parsing/conversion: parse_int, parse_float, parse_json, parse_duration, parse_date, parse_epoch, convert_duration, str, int, float, type_of, is_defined
- time: now, sleep
- http: http_get/post/put/patch/delete/head/options/trace/connect
- system: get_env, get_args, exit, error, confirm, pick, pick_kv, pick_from_resource, multipick
- formatting/color: red, green, yellow, blue, magenta, cyan, white, orange, pink, black, bold, dim, italic, underline, strikethrough, color_rgb, colorize
- stash/state: get_stash_path, load_state, save_state, load_stash_file, write_stash_file, get_rad_home, gen_fid, load
- crypto/encoding: hash, encode_base64, decode_base64, encode_base16, decode_base16, uuid_v4, uuid_v7

**Completeness gate:** before/during the migration, add a codegen test that fails if any registered builtin in `signatures.go` has no `.md` file. Once that gate is in place, the migration becomes a forced march - can't ship until every builtin is covered. Worth landing the gate BEFORE finishing the migration so it acts as a checklist.

**No deep design decisions left** - this is execution. Could be parcelled out to multiple sessions / contributors / agents.
title: Complete docs/funcs/ migration: 5 of ~75 builtins have structured hover docs
